conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 12 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reached" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The summary and Figure 2A state that the median overall survival was not reached for the enzalutamide group."
  B: value="Not reached" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 1 states 'the median overall survival was not reached' for the overall population. The enzalutamide group is the treatment arm. Figure 2A on Page 6 confirms this."

---
Column 2: Median OS (mo) | Overall | Control
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for all patients in the control arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reached" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="The summary and Figure 2A state that the median overall survival was not reached for the control group."
  B: value="Not reached" | page=1 | modality=text | reasoning="Page 1 states 'the median overall survival was not reached' for the overall population. The control group is the control arm. Figure 2A on Page 6 confirms this."

---
Column 3: Median OS (mo) | High volume | Treatment
Definition: What is the median overall survival (in months) for patients with high volume metastasis (by CHAARTED criteria) in the experimental arm? If reported, include the value; use 'Not reported' if missing.

  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="Median overall survival for high volume patients in the treatment arm was not explicitly reported in the provided document pages."
